title: Directory refinement belongs to scaffold skill and hooks
text: Directory refinement should not be modeled as a self-referential MSO workflow. The stable operating boundary is: mso-scaffold-design owns the repository index, directory refinement protocol, and scaffold inventory validation; mso-repository-setup installs the guardrail hook into provider directories; project workflows remain focused on domain artifact supply chains. This keeps MSO from treating its own maintenance procedure as the repository's business workflow while still making index/filesystem drift observable.
author: user

metadata.criterion: MSO maintenance guardrails live in skills/hooks; project workflow topology models domain artifact streams, not MSO self-maintenance.
